name: Writer
description: Registers Writer Palmyra as a first-party OpenAI-compatible chat provider using WRITER_API_KEY or a Plugin Setting.

env.description: Fallback Writer API key used for Palmyra inference and model discovery when no api_key Plugin Setting is configured.

settings.label: Writer API key
settings.description: Writer API key used for Palmyra inference and model discovery. Falls back to WRITER_API_KEY.

providers.name: Writer Palmyra
providers.description: Runs Writer Palmyra chat models through Pi's OpenAI-compatible completions transport.
